mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_watchlist (user_id, stock_code, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{stockCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_watchlist WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_watchlist w LEFT JOIN stock_base_info s ON w.stock_code = s.code WHERE w.user_id = #{userId}
AND (w.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE user_watchlist SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) FROM user_watchlist WHERE user_id = #{userId}
